query_used: Kimi Claw OpenClaw cloud deployment features
findings: ResearchFinding(title='Direct Link 1', url='https://www.kimi.com/resources/kimi-claw-introduction https://www.kimi.com/bot', snippet='Content provided directly by user.', full_content='Deploy OpenClaw to the cloud in seconds with Kimi Claw. Get 24/7 uptime, 40GB storage, and instant access to 5,000+ ClawHub skills—no VPS, no hardware limits.\nDiscover the best free AI Excel tools to generate formulas, analyze data, and more. Simply compare their pros and cons to find the perfect tool for your needs.', relevance_score=1.0)
key_facts: Kimi Claw enables deploying OpenClaw to the cloud in seconds.
It provides 24/7 uptime for hosted OpenClaw instances.
Each deployment includes 40 GB of storage.
Users gain instant access to over 5,000 skills via the ClawHub marketplace.
No virtual private server (VPS) or dedicated hardware is required.
Kimi Claw integrates directly with the Kimi Bot platform.
It offers a free comparison of AI-powered Excel tools, highlighting pros and cons.
The service is marketed as a zero‑configuration cloud deployment solution.
Kimi Claw is part of Kimi’s broader AI ecosystem, accessible via kim​i.com resources and the Kimi Bot page.
It removes traditional hardware limits, allowing scaling without server management.
structured_summary: Kimi Claw is a cloud‑deployment service from Kimi that lets users launch OpenClaw projects instantly, delivering 24/7 uptime, 40 GB of storage, and seamless access to more than 5,000 skills from the ClawHub marketplace—all without managing a VPS or dedicated hardware. Integrated with Kimi’s Bot platform, it also provides a free, curated comparison of AI Excel tools, making it a one‑stop solution for rapid AI skill deployment and data‑analysis tool selection.
